system.name: ROLLON AR
system.description: Single-operator A&R operating system replacing Airtable. Flask + Google Sheets API + Vanilla JS.

audit_findings.title: Passwords hardcoded in source
audit_findings.description: APP_PASSWORD and ASSISTANT_PASSWORD default to plaintext 'rollon2026' and 'assistant2026' in source. Env var fallback exists but defaults to real passwords.
audit_findings.soc2: CC6.1 Logical and Physical Access Controls
audit_findings.fix_applied: Removed hardcoded defaults. Passwords loaded from .env file or env vars. Interactive prompt on first run saves to .env. .env added to .gitignore.

audit_findings.title: Formula injection on public submit + edit
audit_findings.description: User-submitted strings written directly to Google Sheets cells. A submission with '=IMPORTRANGE(...)' in title would execute as formula.
audit_findings.soc2: CC6.1 Logical and Physical Access Controls
audit_findings.fix_applied: sanitize_cell() prefixes dangerous characters (=, +, -, @, tab, cr, lf) with single quote. Applied to api_submit_song and api_submit_edit via sanitize_dict().

audit_findings.title: No CSRF protection on POST routes
audit_findings.description: All POST endpoints accepted raw JSON with no CSRF token. Malicious page could make requests to localhost:5001 while user is logged in.
nist: SC-23(1) Invalidate Session IDs at Logout
audit_findings.soc2: CC6.1 Logical and Physical Access Controls
audit_findings.fix_applied: Per-session CSRF token via secrets.token_urlsafe(32). @app.before_request middleware checks X-CSRF-Token header on all authenticated POST requests. Fetch wrapper in base.html auto-injects token. Public endpoints exempt.

audit_findings.title: Sheets API 429 quota exhaustion handling
audit_findings.description: Google Sheets API returns 429 when quota is exceeded. No retry logic existed.
audit_findings.fix_applied: _retry() method with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s + jitter) on 429/500/503. 401 triggers credential refresh. All 14 API methods wrapped.

audit_findings.title: Views persisted to localStorage only
audit_findings.description: Saved views lost on browser data clear or device switch.
audit_findings.soc2: CC6.1 Logical and Physical Access Controls
audit_findings.fix_applied: ViewSync utility: localStorage for instant load, debounced 2s save to Views sheet tab via /api/views/<page> endpoints. Wired into songs, directory, pitch, invoices.

audit_findings.title: Backend split validation missing
audit_findings.description: api_submit_song accepted any split values via direct API call.
audit_findings.soc2: CC6.1 Logical and Physical Access Controls
audit_findings.fix_applied: Backend regex extraction of percentages from songwriter_credits. Validates sum equals 100% within 0.1% tolerance.

audit_findings.title: Contact deduplication on submit
audit_findings.description: api_submit_song auto-created Personnel records with no dedup check.
audit_findings.soc2: CC6.1 Logical and Physical Access Controls
audit_findings.fix_applied: Normalized name matching (lowercase, collapse whitespace) against existing Personnel. Skips creation if duplicate found. Logs skipped entries.

audit_findings.title: Batch cell updates (edit + metadata)
audit_findings.description: Individual cell edits fired 2-5 separate API calls.
audit_findings.fix_applied: Songs and Directory update endpoints use batch_update_cells() to combine edit + Last Modified + Modified By into single API call.

audit_findings.title: Collapsible group headers
audit_findings.description: Group By rendered headers but could not collapse/expand.
audit_findings.fix_applied: _toggleGroup(), _collapseAllGroups() with persistent state via _collapsedGroups Set. Arrow indicators. Collapse All / Expand All buttons.

audit_findings.title: No column resize
audit_findings.description: Column widths CSS-fixed. Long values truncated with no recourse.
audit_findings.fix_applied: Drag resize handles on every <th>. Persistent widths in localStorage (_colWidths). CSS hover reveal. Body cursor lock during drag. Matching td sync.

audit_findings.title: Bare except:pass blocks
audit_findings.description: 36 bare except:pass blocks across Python files. Silent failures make debugging difficult.
audit_findings.fix_applied: All 36 bare except:pass blocks replaced with specific exceptions (ValueError, TypeError, Exception) and logging.warning() calls across app.py and all modules.

audit_findings.title: threaded=False blocks concurrent requests
audit_findings.description: ARM64 segfault workaround. If Sheets API takes 3s, entire app frozen for all tabs.
audit_findings.fix_applied: Switched to gunicorn (1 worker, 4 threads) with Flask dev server fallback. Deploy.command auto-installs gunicorn. Avoids ARM64 segfault while allowing concurrent requests.

audit_findings.title: Edit tokens stored in memory only
audit_findings.description: _edit_tokens dict lost on server restart. No cleanup of expired tokens.
audit_findings.soc2: CC6.1 Logical and Physical Access Controls
audit_findings.fix_applied: Edit tokens persisted to .edit_tokens.json with thread-safe locking. Periodic cleanup thread removes expired tokens every 60s. File reloaded on server start, discarding expired entries.

audit_findings.title: Rate limiter uses in-memory dict keyed by IP
audit_findings.description: Behind proxy, request.remote_addr is always proxy IP. _submit_times dict never cleaned.
audit_findings.soc2: CC6.1 Logical and Physical Access Controls
audit_findings.fix_applied: _get_client_ip() reads X-Forwarded-For header (first hop) with remote_addr fallback. Thread-safe locking on _submit_times. Periodic cleanup thread purges stale entries every 60s.

audit_findings.title: next_system_id() not atomic
audit_findings.description: Classic TOCTOU race on concurrent creates. Low risk in single-operator mode.
audit_findings.soc2: CC6.1 Logical and Physical Access Controls
audit_findings.fix_applied: Added threading.Lock (_ID_LOCK) around entire next_system_id() function. Prevents TOCTOU race on concurrent creates.

audit_findings.title: SMTP credentials visible in source defaults
audit_findings.description: SMTP_USER defaults to celina@rollonent.com. SMTP_PASS defaults empty (safe) but email address exposed in source.
audit_findings.soc2: CC6.1 Logical and Physical Access Controls
audit_findings.fix_applied: Removed email default from SMTP_USER. All SMTP config now loaded from env vars or .env file. .env.example provided.

audit_findings.title: Multi-level sort not implemented
audit_findings.description: Backend accepts one sort field. Sort panel UI appears to support multiple but only first is used.
audit_findings.fix_applied: Backend: parse_sort_fields() and apply_multi_sort() support up to 5 sort levels via sort0_field/sort0_dir params (with legacy sort/dir fallback). Frontend: sortFields array replaces sortField/sortDir across songs, directory, pitch, invoices. Sort panel already supported multiple entries; now all are applied. Views save/load with backward compat.

audit_findings.title: Filter text inputs don't auto-suggest values
audit_findings.description: Autocomplete endpoint exists but not wired to filter inputs.
audit_findings.fix_applied: Filter text inputs wired to /api/autocomplete/<table>/<field> with debounced typeahead dropdown (.fac-item). Shows suggestions on input and focus. Keyboard support (Enter to apply, Escape to dismiss). Click-outside dismissal. CSS styled in style.css.

audit_findings.title: No email format validation on submission
audit_findings.description: Submit form checks for non-empty email but not format. Invalid emails corrupt mail merge.
audit_findings.soc2: CC6.1 Logical and Physical Access Controls
audit_findings.fix_applied: Added regex validation (^[^@\s]+@[^@\s]+\.[^@\s]+$) to api_submit_song and api_submit_edit. Returns 400 on invalid format.

audit_findings.title: Playlist view counter burns API quota
audit_findings.description: Public playlist endpoint calls update_cell() on every page load. Invalidates cache.
audit_findings.fix_applied: View counts buffered in _playlist_views dict (thread-safe). Flushed to Sheets every 60s by periodic cleanup thread. Public page shows current + pending count for accurate display without per-request API call.

controls.name: Authenticator Management
controls.description: Organization manages information system authenticators by verifying identity, initial content, and administrative procedures.
controls.note: F-001 passwords and F-016 SMTP defaults both closed in V32i. Credentials loaded from .env/env vars.

controls.name: Session Authenticity
controls.description: Information system protects the authenticity of communications sessions.
controls.note: CSRF fixed in V32h. Edit tokens persisted to file with cleanup in V32h.

controls.name: Information Input Validation
controls.description: Information system checks the validity of information inputs.
controls.note: All SI-10 findings closed: formula injection, splits, dedup, email validation, atomic IDs.

controls.name: Error Handling
controls.description: Information system generates error messages that provide information necessary for corrective actions without revealing exploitable information.
controls.note: All 36 bare except:pass blocks replaced with specific exceptions and logging in V32i.

controls.name: Denial of Service Protection
controls.description: System protects against or limits effects of denial of service attacks.
controls.note: All SC-5 findings closed: 429 retry, batch updates, threading, rate limiter X-Forwarded-For, playlist view batching.

controls.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
controls.description: System protects confidentiality and integrity of transmitted information.
controls.note: SMTP uses STARTTLS. Credential defaults removed in V32i, loaded from .env/env vars.

controls.name: Content of Audit Records
controls.description: Audit records contain information about what type of event occurred, when, where, source, outcome.
controls.note: Performance monitor logs slow requests. All except blocks now log with specific exceptions.

controls.name: System Backup
controls.description: Organization conducts backups of user-level and system-level information.
controls.note: Views sync to Sheets. Edit tokens persisted to file with periodic cleanup.

soc2_trust_criteria.framework: SOC 2 Type II Trust Service Criteria (2017)

criteria.name: Logical and Physical Access Controls
criteria.description: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures over protected information assets.
criteria.note: All CC6.1 findings closed: CSRF, formula injection, splits, dedup, views persistence, passwords, email validation, rate limiter, edit tokens, atomic IDs.

criteria.name: System Operations - Monitoring
criteria.description: The entity monitors system components and evaluates detected anomalies for deviations.
criteria.note: All CC7.2 findings closed: API retry, batch updates, error handling, threading, playlist view batching.

exit_criteria.description: The task is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

must_pass.note: F-002 (formula injection) and F-003 (CSRF) both closed in V32h.
F-004 (429 retry), F-005 (views persistence), F-006 (splits), F-007 (dedup), F-008 (batch updates) all closed.

must_pass.rule: All NIST SI-10 (Input Validation) controls passing
must_pass.note: F-019 email validation and F-015 atomic IDs closed in V32i.

must_pass.rule: All NIST IA-5 (Authenticator Management) controls passing
must_pass.note: F-001 hardcoded passwords closed in V32i. Passwords now required from .env or env vars.

must_pass.rule: All NIST SI-11 (Error Handling) controls passing
must_pass.note: F-011 all 36 bare except:pass blocks replaced in V32i.
F-017 multi-level sort implemented in V32i.
F-001, F-011, F-012 all closed in V32i.

should_pass.rule: All MEDIUM findings have documented remediation plan
should_pass.note: Every MEDIUM finding has effort estimate and fix description in this file.

should_pass.rule: Airtable invoice data migrated from legacy base
should_pass.note: 277 invoices imported (212 ROLLON ENT + 65 RYE) from Airtable base appQbyUfSpeM1WQnl via API on 2026-04-15. All fields mapped. Airtable IDs preserved.

should_pass.rule: Filter auto-suggest wired to autocomplete endpoint
should_pass.note: F-018 closed. Autocomplete wired to filter text inputs with typeahead dropdown.

remaining_effort_to_exit.note: All 20 findings closed. All exit criteria PASSING.

version_history.changes: Audio Status pills, duration format, notes modal, splits validation, equal splits, URL prefill
SMTP confirmations, edit tokens, playlists, email templates, follow-up reminders, performance monitor
Pitch page 95% overhaul: search, bulk ops, history, dupe check, round auto-increment, timezone send, CSV export
Multi-select tag fields, behavioral search intelligence, 90+ city timezone mapping, invoice form upgrade
Formula injection fix, CSRF protection, column resize, ViewSync to Sheets API, cache version bump

conventions.versioning: Every zip delivery uses unique incremented filename. Never reuse. V32h -> V32i -> V33 etc.
conventions.deploy: Download zip to ~/ROLLON AR/, double-click Deploy.command
conventions.credentials: credentials.json and token.json live in parent ROLLON AR folder
conventions.company_name: Always ROLLON ENT in all caps
conventions.no_dashes: Never use double dashes (--) or em-dashes in any output
conventions.code_files: Every delivery must have unique incremented filename with version header and change log
